title: ESIC Kolkata Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 86 Senior Resident Posts
description: Employees' State Insurance Corporation Kolkata (ESIC Kolkata) has released an official notificaton recruitment for 86 Senior Resident Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the MD/ MS, DNB, and MDS can grab this chance and apply for the ESIC Kolkata Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
